description: SERPINF1 GTEx tissue expression profile bar chart
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

tissues = [
    'Cervix Endocervix', 'Cervix Ectocervix', 'Fallopian Tube',
    'Adipose Subcut.', 'Breast', 'Nerve Tibial', 'Adipose Visceral',
    'Ovary', 'Uterus', 'Art. Coronary', 'Vagina', 'Fibroblasts',
    'Testis', 'Liver', 'Art. Tibial', 'Thyroid', 'Prostate',
    'Bladder', 'Heart Atrial', 'Muscle Skeletal',
    'Lung', 'Skin (exposed)', 'Spleen', 'Art. Aorta',
    'Colon Sigmoid', 'Pituitary', 'Heart LV', 'Pancreas',
    'Brain Frontal', 'Adrenal', 'Brain Cortex',
    'Kidney Cortex', 'Brain Amygdala', 'Brain Cerebellum',
    'Whole Blood', 'Brain Putamen'
]

values = [776.6, 744.0, 733.7, 574.2, 490.6, 483.3, 482.3,
          473.3, 451.5, 391.8, 333.2, 316.9, 279.8, 279.7,
          260.4, 243.4, 237.4, 219.0, 188.3, 179.5,
          161.5, 156.7, 138.5, 130.2, 122.2, 63.6, 58.2, 46.3,
          42.2, 40.8, 26.9, 13.4, 8.7, 4.2, 2.6, 2.2]

colors = []
for t in tissues:
    if 'Brain' in t:
        colors.append('#3498db')
    elif 'Adipose' in t or 'Breast' in t or 'Liver' in t:
        colors.append('#e74c3c')
    elif 'Cervix' in t or 'Fallopian' in t or 'Uterus' in t or 'Ovary' in t or 'Vagina' in t or 'Testis' in t or 'Prostate' in t:
        colors.append('#9b59b6')
    elif 'Art.' in t or 'Heart' in t:
        colors.append('#e67e22')
    elif 'Muscle' in t or 'Nerve' in t or 'Fibroblast' in t:
        colors.append('#2ecc71')
    else:
        colors.append('#95a5a6')

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 12))
y_pos = np.arange(len(tissues))
ax.barh(y_pos, values, color=colors, alpha=0.8, height=0.7)
ax.set_yticks(y_pos)
ax.set_yticklabels(tissues, fontsize=8)
ax.invert_yaxis()
ax.set_xlabel('Median TPM (GTEx v8)', fontsize=11)
ax.set_title('SERPINF1 Tissue Expression Profile\n(GTEx v8, Selected Tissues)', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')

legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#9b59b6', alpha=0.8, label='Reproductive'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#e74c3c', alpha=0.8, label='Adipose/Metabolic'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#2ecc71', alpha=0.8, label='Musculoskeletal'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#e67e22', alpha=0.8, label='Cardiovascular'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#3498db', alpha=0.8, label='Brain'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#95a5a6', alpha=0.8, label='Other'),
]
ax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower right', fontsize=8, framealpha=0.9)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('serpinf1_expression.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Expression profile visualization saved")
